titleStmt.title: SII 26.784: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 784. (A.R. No. 733 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vīrarājēndradēvar (Kulōttuṅga III): Year 5, Mēsha (Chittirai) śu. 1, Saturday, Aśvati = 1183 A.D., March 26.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with puyalvāyttu vaḷam peruga, etc.

It records a sale of land 5-3/4 mā in extent and a house of 22-1/2 kuḻi in area, in Śrī-Madurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam, in Poygaināḍu, in Vaḍakarai-Irāśarāśa-vaḷanāḍu, by some bhaṭṭa people of Vaṅgipuram of the above mentioned village, to the temple of Śrī-Kayi[lāsam-uḍaiya-mahādēvar] of the place. The price of the land is stated to be 402-1/2 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu and that of the house 17-1/2 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu.

A number of people figure as signatories, and a certain woman named Uḍaiyapiḷḷai, daughter of Pāṟvati alias Nittavinōdamāṇikkam (details of her family lost) is stated to have paid the charges for engraving this record on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷamperukap po
yyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppa ti
rumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇ
mati poṟkuṭaiviḷaṅka velventaraṭi
vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉu
niti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅko
lun tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭappa kaṟpa
kālam puvikāppa poṟpamainta muṭipu
ṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉat
tut tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesa
ripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrīvirarājentiracoḻadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu Añcāvatumeṣanāyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣattu prathamaiyu caṉikkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa Aśvatināḷ vaṭakarai Irācarācavaḷanāṭ
ṭu poykai nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīmaturā
ntakaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṅkippuṟattu śrīkraṣṇa
paṭṭaṉāṉa tillaivā
comatevapaṭṭaṉu mivaṉ tampi śrīkraṣṇa paṭṭa
ṉumivaṉ tampi Uḷakaḷantapperumāḷ coma
ṉtampi Āḷ �ṉ taṉma
ntiṉ
vaṉ pāryyai Āṇṭa
ka Almotu cā
vūr Uṭaiyār śrīkayi
koyilādicaṇḍe
cāvatu tevaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamum ma
ṉaiyum Ivvūr mel piṭākai tiyā
kasamuttiranallūr kaṭṭaḷaiy śrīko n
kumiḻikku meṟku tirucciṟṟampala vākkālu
kku kiḻakku Erikaraikku teṟku mutaṟtuṇi maṉṉar
kaḷukku kūṟṟāṭi kommāṉ Ūṟpaṭi nilam 5mā � (1/2) nilam
Aiñcu mā mukkāṇikkum kiḻpāṟkellai kuṭukkuṟ
ṟontiṭal nilattukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai vaṅkipu
ṟattup parameśvarapaṭṭaṉilattukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellai
karaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Erikaraikku teṟkumāka vicai
nta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam 5mā� Innilamañcumā
mukkāṇiyum viṟṟu kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta
vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 4 100 2(1/2) Ikkācu
nāṉūṟṟiraṇṭaraiyum pāṅkuṭiyūr nattattu melaik
kuṟucciyiṟ kiḻaitteruvil kiḻciṟakil vaṭakka
ṭaiya kuvaḷai kiḻavaṉ kuṭiyiruppāyeṅkaḷaṉai
vomukkum potuvāṉa maṉaiyoṉṟiṉāl ma
ṉai kuḻi 2 10 2 Immaṉai kuḻi Irupattiraṇṭukku
ṅ kiḻpāṟkellai Iraṇṭu kuṟiccikku na
ṭuviṭṭut teṟku nokkippoṉa vā
ykkālukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai
kkuṉṟomaṉaikku vaṭakku mipāṟ�
lai teruvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
maṉaikku teṟku Āka Icainta peru
nāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉai kuḻi 2 10 2(1/2)
maṉaikkuḻi Irupattiraṇṭum viṟṟu kuṭuttuk ko
ḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉ
ṟāṭu naṟkācu 10 7(1/2) Ikkācu Itaṟkuṟaiteṟ
patiṉeḻaraiyum Ikkācu 4 100 2 10 Ikkācu nāṉū
ṟṟirupatuṅkoṇṭom koṇṭapaṭi Āvatu
Eṅkaḷaṉaivo nilaṅkaḷukkuṅ kaṭamait taṭi
yāy nilamum maṉaiyum viṟṟirukka veṇ
yilikkācu nāṉūṟṟirupatu meṅkaḷ perāṟ kaṭamai
kku kuṇṭikaiyile veṭṭivittu In yāl
kkācu nāṉūṟṟirupatuṅ kaiccilavaṟak
koṇṭu Innilamu maṉaiyum viṟṟukkuṭut
tomi vādicaṇḍeśvarappiḷḷaiyāṟku
tillaivāḻantaṇanampiyuḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉai
vom Innilattukku maṉaikkumavarkaḷ veṇume
ṉṟapote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkakka
ṭavomākavuṅ kuṭuttilomākilit tiṭṭuppi
ramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭiyicaintu I
caivu tiṭṭukkuṭuttomivuṭaiyār koyilādicaṇḍeśvarappiḷḷaiyāṟku Ivaṅkipuṟa tillaivāḻantaṇanampi
yumivaṉ makaṉ comatevapaṭṭaṉu mivaṉ tampi śrīkraṣṇapaṭṭaṉu mivaṉ tampi valantarum perumāḷāāṉa comatevacaṉmaṉu
mivaṉ tampi Āṇṭāṉcaṉmaṉumit tillaivāḻantaṇanampi pāryyaikaḷilāṇṭāṭ cāṇi kamalli mātuccāṉi
yumivaṉaivom ... Ivakaḷ veṇṭikkoḷḷa Ipramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ kaṇṭe ṭṭaṭuṉeṉivaiye
ṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Eṉakku meṉ pāryyaikaḷāṇṭāṭcāṉikku malli mātuccāṉi kkumatukaṇpaṭṭu
Inilamum maṉaiyum viṟṟukkoṭuttu Eṅkaḷ nilattut taṭṭukku Ikkācu nāṉūṟṟirupatuṅ kuṇṭikaiyile Iṭuvittamaikku Ivai vaṅ
kippuṟattu śrīkraṣṇapaṭṭaṉāṉa tillaivāḻantaṇanampiyeṉivaiyeṉeḻuttu ... Ippaṭikivai vaṅkipuṟattut tillaivāḻntaṇanampi makaṉ coma
tevapaṭṭaṉe ṉivaiyeṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tillaivāḻantaṇanampi makaṉ cikiṭṭapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu . Itu vaṅkipuṟattu tillaivāḻantaṇanampi makaṉāṇṭāṉ caṉ
maṉ samjñeyāṉamaikku noṭar muttanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikkivai tillaivāḻantaṇanampi makaṉ comatevacaṉmaneṉivaiyeṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkippuṟattu citarapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ciṟukoṭṭaiyūr cikiṭṭa paṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ciṟu
koṭṭaiyūṟ tāmotarava mpiraṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ neraṭṭuṟ colaippirāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiven va
ṅkippuṟattu parameśvara paṭi Aṟiven ciṟupuḷūṟ tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭiaṟiven vaṅkipuṟattu pañcanetivāṇapaṭṭaṉeṉ .
Ippaṭi Aṟiven vaṅkipuṟattu paramporuḷ paṭṭaṉeṉ Ikkal� kaikku taccakū ṇṭār tirumañcanamaḻakiyār veṇaṭṭu taccakūli
kuṭuttāḷikkoyil ḷa pāṟvatiyāṉa nittavinota māṇikkattiṉ makaḷ Uṭaiyapiḷḷai . panmāheśvararakṣai .

kuney Irunāḻi muvuḻakke nāṟ ceviṭāka vanta ney nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupattañcukku
toṇṇūṟṟoru nāḻi Uḻakku Āka vanta neyyāle Oru nuntā viḷakkuc cantirātittavaṟ Erikka
kkaṭavo muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇarom ... Ikkalveṭṭu vittārivūrirukku māṇaparā
panmāheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 26.784 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
